name: Zucchini Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
4. Optionally, add green peppers and sliced tomatoes for color.
5. Bake for 30 minutes or until set and lightly browned.
